title: Set up Firebase Authentication in Next.js
summary: Integrate Firebase Auth (v10 Modular SDK) into Next.js App Router — client-side auth, session cookies via Firebase Admin, SSR-compatible user context, and protected routes.
declaration: I will integrate Firebase Authentication using the Firebase v10 modular SDK. This sets up client-side auth with Google/Email, server-side session cookies via the Admin SDK for SSR, and a React context for the current user. If you want Auth.js or Clerk instead, say so before I begin.
